name: Laser Sounds
short_description: You are a mercenary hired by the Space Company to inspect the space station, which has not been heard from for years, because of the news you have received that some experiments are being carried out. Your goal is to clear everyone from this space station.
detailed_description:
You are a mercenary hired by the Space Company to inspect the space station, which has not been heard from for years, because of the news you have received that some experiments are being carried out. Your goal is to clear everyone from this space station.

You have to reclaim the space station by clearing robots and other creatures and deliver it to its owners.

Your task won't be easy, but that doesn't mean it's impossible.

Features

  • Stylized Graphics
  • Simple Gameplay Elements
  • The story that wasn't told straight
  • Simple Controls
  • Controller Support
about_the_game:
You are a mercenary hired by the Space Company to inspect the space station, which has not been heard from for years, because of the news you have received that some experiments are being carried out. Your goal is to clear everyone from this space station.

Your task won't be easy, but that doesn't mean it's impossible.

Features

  • Simple Gameplay Elements
  • The story that wasn't told straight
  • Simple Controls
  • Controller Support
